contexts.context: ...letter dated 6 July 1970.  When the historian <mark>Friedrich</mark> Heer and YAuden, both entranced, struck sparks...
...mkuttering to itself unheeded until the familiar voice of <mark>Friedrich</mark> Heeerrre came through, reading one of his book reviews...
...-depressive Genie,und dieser innerlich verschreckte Lausbub <mark>Friedrich</mark> Heer, und der grosse englische Dichter Auden,...
